account.title: My account

profile.title: Merchant Profile

notFound.title: Page not found

history.noHistoryBody: Confirm prices on the dashboard to start recording history.

hero.sub: Verified merchants post their buying prices for coffee, pepper, cardamom and arecanut every day. Farmers compare, call, and sell on their own terms.
hero.trust: Every merchant is verified before their first price goes live.

how.title: Three steps. One honest price.
how.s1d: Verified merchants publish their buying prices each morning.
how.s2d: Every rate side by side, freshest first, crop by crop.
how.s3d: Talk directly and settle on your own terms. The price you saw is the price you discuss.

alerts.title: Name your price. We watch the market.
alerts.body: Follow a crop, set the number you want, and the moment a verified merchant posts above it a notification lands on your phone.
alerts.b1: Alerts for every crop you follow
alerts.b3: Push notifications in Kannada or English
alerts.chartCaption: When a posted price crosses your target, your phone knows first.
alerts.notifBody: A verified merchant just posted above your alert price. Open to compare and call.

sides.title: Two sides. One market.
sides.farmerTitle: Walk into every deal knowing the price.
sides.farmerLede: Stop guessing at the gate. See what merchants are paying today and choose who to call.
sides.f2: Call merchants directly from the app
sides.f3: Set price alerts for your target rate
sides.merchantTitle: Your price, in every farmer's pocket.
sides.merchantLede: Post once each morning and reach farmers who are ready to sell today.
sides.m1: Publish your rates in under a minute
sides.m2: A verified badge that earns trust
sides.m3: Farmers ready to sell call you directly

trust.title: Built on trust, not talk.
trust.t1d: Every merchant is reviewed by our team before their first price goes live.
trust.t2d: Farmers and merchants talk to each other. Nobody stands in between.
trust.t3d: Every screen, every alert, in the language you think in.

cta.title: Tomorrow morning, know the price first.
cta.body: Join Urimalu today and start every market day with the answer in your hand.
